front.title: A humble broom
front.description:
Just a well-worn stick of rowan wood, in need of some new bristles. You wouldn't give it another thought. Except... when you hold it, and sweep with it, you find yourself humming a half-remembered tune.

Clearly, there is more to this broom than meets the eye.

list.description: To unlock its mysteries, you must…
… find a Fae who can hear the broom's song in its entirety.
… convince them to teach you the broom's song in full.
… use the broom at least once a day for a whole season, singing the lullaby as you do.
… risk falling into a lasting, timeless sleep as you practice the lullaby.

back.title: The Broom's Lullaby
back.description:
When you start sweeping an area as you softly sing the lullaby, roll +CHA: on a 7+, those who see and hear you stop to watch and listen, at least for a bit, entranced or confused or bemused as fits their nature and the circumstances. They snap out of it if harmed or threatened. Also, on a 10+, you can hold their attention for the length of the lullaby, as long as no one is harmed or threatened.

When you sing the full lullaby, sweeping all the while, roll +CHA: on a 10+, all who hear you fall into a deep sleep and will be prone to dismiss this as just a dream; on a 7-9, all who hear you start to nod off or lapse into a light, jerking sleep, but they will certainly remember this when they come to; on a 6-, at least one of your audience snaps to and realizes just how weird all this is.

move.name: When you start sweeping an area as you softly sing the lullaby
move.description: Roll +CHA: on a 7+, those who see and hear you stop to watch and listen, entranced. On a 10+, you can hold their attention for the length of the lullaby. When you sing the full lullaby while sweeping, roll +CHA: on a 10+, all who hear fall into a deep sleep; on a 7-9, they nod off but will remember; on a 6-, at least one snaps to.
